summary: P2-A3 rules-only feature aggregates (#300): services/aggregates package queries orders/products/returns via SQL repos only; no ML artifact imports; health_data_source unavailable tier suppresses fabricated SPS/VP/AHR; shop_profile classifier ported with 5 golden boundary fixtures. No web/, ios/, or src/modules/ml/ drift. 13/13 contract tests pass.

criticalFindings.description: list_limit=10000 may truncate aggregates for very large shops; pagination not yet implemented for batch job.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Add cursor pagination or SQL SUM/COUNT aggregates in P2-B slice when batch scheduler lands.

criticalFindings.description: ShopLifecycleContext (probation_status, API health scores) is caller-supplied until Shop rows persist lifecycle fields.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Wire batch runner to populate lifecycle from verified SPS contract or explicit unavailable per endpoints.md.

interfaceChanges.description: Async entry point rolling up synced commerce tables into FeatureAggregateSnapshot.
